name: Instagram Profile Picture
description: Downloads an image from a URL, then sets it as the Instagram profile picture via Edit Profile.

params.imageUrl: Direct URL to the image file to use as profile picture

steps.goal: Download an image file to the device. Use the download action with url {{imageUrl}} and save it as {{albumName}}/profile_pic.jpg.
Press the Home button to go to the Android home screen.
Open Instagram and navigate to the Edit Profile screen. Dismiss any popups. Go to your profile tab (bottom-right icon), then tap 'Edit profile'. You should see fields like Name, Username, Bio.

If you see 'Choose from library' on screen, tap it immediately. Otherwise, tap the 'Edit picture or avatar' button, then tap 'Choose from library' from the bottom sheet that appears. A gallery or file picker will open.
You are now in a gallery or file picker app (e.g. Samsung Gallery). Navigate to the Albums tab if not already there. Tap 'View all' (or 'See all') in the albums section to see all albums.
You see the full album list ('All albums'). Find and tap the album named '{{albumName}}'.

You are inside the '{{albumName}}' album showing 1 image. Tap the image thumbnail to select it and return to Instagram. If you end up in a full-screen image viewer instead, press Back and try tapping the image again, or look for a 'Select' or 'Done' button.
